name: SIUT
mission: Established in 2000, SIUT North America is a charitable organization under Section 501(c)(3). It is dedicated to health-related humanitarian causes, with its major focus on helping Sindh Institute of Urology and Transplantation (SIUT) Pakistan secure vital medical funds so all patients are treated free of charge and without discrimination.
scoreSummary: SIUT North America Inc shows strong alignment and good impact, with zakat compliance (minor risk deductions applied).
zakatClaimEvidence: SIUT North America's website explicitly states: "Zakat and Sadaqah Giving. Multiply your blessings by donating Zakat & Sadaqah to provide free medical care. Give Your Zakat.". Additionally, it is mentioned that "Your Zakat and Sadaqah has the power to save lives. Donate to SIUTNA and help us provide free healthcare with dignity.". SIUT North America also has a dedicated 'Zakat' campaign option on Kindful. (Source: https://siutna.org/ways-to-donate/)

ui_signals_v1.recommendation_rationale: Good donor alignment with manageable risk. Evidence quality is solid but still evolving in places.

dimension_explanations.alignment: With an alignment score of 40/50, the organization shows high donor fit for those prioritizing humanitarian medical causes [7]. It is officially Zakat-eligible, allowing it to serve as a primary vehicle for Islamic charitable obligations toward healthcare for the needy [6][7].
dimension_explanations.impact: The charity demonstrates direct impact by funding essential medical procedures, maintaining a high program expense ratio of 84.0% [1][8]. While it provides direct services through its partner trust, the impact score of 31/50 reflects a balanced view of its effective financial health and the specialized nature of its medical interventions [1][2].

baseline_narrative.headline: SIUT North America Inc provides critical financial support for life-saving medical treatments including dialysis and cancer care for the SIUT Charitable Trust.
strengths: High program expense ratio of 84.0% ensuring most funds reach medical programs
Strong financial health with a Charity Navigator score of 92.0/100
Efficient fundraising operations costing only $0.17 per $1 raised
Verified Zakat-eligible status for Muslim donors
baseline_narrative.summary: SIUT North America Inc is a registered 501(c)(3) organization dedicated to supporting the medical initiatives of the SIUT Charitable Trust Karachi [2][8]. The organization facilitates funding for essential healthcare services such as dialysis sessions, cancer treatments, and diagnostic measures for underserved populations [4][6].

ideal_donor_profile.best_for_summary: Best for donors who want to provide high-tech medical relief to the poor in Pakistan through a highly transparent, zakat-eligible institution.

Care about healthcare infrastructure in Pakistan
Value high program expense ratios and financial efficiency
Prefer supporting established medical trusts with specialized care

impact_evidence.evidence_grade_explanation: Grade B reflects verified financial grants and outcome tracking via Candid, though specific beneficiary data is missing.
impact_evidence.theory_of_change_summary: The charity provides funding for medical equipment and supplies to enable free, high-quality healthcare for those who cannot afford it.
impact_evidence.why_evidence_matters: Evidence ensures that high-cost medical equipment is effectively utilized to save lives.

long_term_outlook.room_for_funding_explanation: The high cost of specialized medical care in Pakistan creates a continuous need for expanded funding.

strengths.detail: The organization maintains a <cite id="1">92.0/100 from Charity Navigator score</cite> and spends only <cite id="1">$0.17 to raise every $1</cite>.
A significant <cite id="1">84.0% of total expenses</cite> go directly to medical programs and <cite id="4">equipment grants</cite>.
The charity operates with an <cite id="1">independent board of 7 members</cite> and has earned a <cite id="1">100/100 score for Leadership and Culture</cite>.

strengths_deep_dive: SIUT North America demonstrates a high level of fiscal responsibility, evidenced by its <cite id="1">4.0 months of working capital</cite> and efficient fundraising. The organization successfully scaled its impact, increasing <cite id="4">grants for medicine and equipment to $5,136,716</cite> in the most recent filing year. Their commitment to transparency is further validated by a <cite id="1">92/100 Accountability beacon score</cite> and a <cite id="1">91/100 Impact beacon score</cite> from Charity Navigator.
rich_narrative.summary: SIUT North America Inc serves as a critical financial engine for the SIUT Charitable Trust, providing life-saving medical care to underserved populations in Pakistan. The organization reported <cite id="8">$5,921,512 in total revenue in 2023</cite>, representing a <cite id="8">3-year revenue CAGR of 18.9%</cite>. This growth supports a high-impact model where <cite id="1">84.0% of expenses are directed to programs</cite>, primarily through <cite id="4">grants for medicine and equipment</cite>. The charity maintains <cite id="1">an overall score of 92.0/100 from Charity Navigator</cite>, reflecting strong accountability and financial health. Their work focuses on high-cost medical interventions, including <cite id="6">dialysis sessions, cancer treatments, and complex surgeries</cite>. By facilitating <cite id="4">over $5.1 million in grants</cite> for medical supplies, the organization ensures that financial barriers do not prevent patients from receiving essential care. The charity holds a Platinum Seal of Transparency from Candid, the highest level of disclosure available. This level of transparency, combined with <cite id="7">verified zakat eligibility</cite>, makes it a prominent choice for donors seeking to support healthcare infrastructure in Muslim-majority regions.
